column1: # Character & manner — personality traits and social conduct.
# Belongs here: how a person is or behaves toward others (真面目, 親切, 素直,
# 失礼), including style of presentation (派手, 地味) and being a bother
# (邪魔, 迷惑). Skill at a task goes in ability.tsv.

column5: [真: true/genuine | 面: face/surface | 目: eye]
